name: Fa Yuiry
description:
Hardship By Choice

Fa Yuiry aka the cooler Fraw Bow. Homegirl was real in Zeta and Double Zeta. P.S: If you want to experience a great Fa Yuiry (unlike my lackluster one), check out https://janitorai.com/profiles/4e781226-c404-4d15-8a8a-80ea3904e794_profile-of-terminus-unic Fa Yuiry bot (it's amazing ✍️✍️🔥✍️🔥✍️🔥)

Changes/Notes:

• 1st is during Zeta, second is after Double Zeta

• 1st Intro: Fa comes to help {{user}} against Yazan and his team

• 2 intro: Fa looks after a crippled or hurt {{user}} following the First Neo Zeon War
